title: Post-operative discharge note with care needs and complications denied

items.name: laparoscopic cholecystectomy
items.source_quote: Laparoscopic cholecystectomy performed for symptomatic cholelithiasis.

items.name: symptomatic cholelithiasis
items.source_quote: Laparoscopic cholecystectomy performed for symptomatic cholelithiasis.

items.name: postoperative nausea
items.source_quote: Mild postoperative nausea resolved before discharge.

items.name: acetaminophen
items.source_quote: Acetaminophen 650 mg every six hours as needed for pain.

items.name: oxycodone
items.source_quote: Oxycodone 5 mg every six hours as needed for severe pain, dispense eight tablets.

items.name: sumatriptan
items.source_quote: Sumatriptan 50 mg as needed for migraine.

items.name: lifting restriction
items.source_quote: Do not lift more than 10 pounds for two weeks.

items.name: surgery clinic follow-up
items.source_quote: Follow up with surgery clinic in 10 days.

items.name: return precautions
items.source_quote: Return for fever, worsening abdominal pain, jaundice, or drainage from incision.
